hero.name: Mohamed Ayman
hero.tagline: I craft digital experiences that live at the intersection of design and engineering.

about.title:
Turning complex
problems into elegant
solutions.
about.bio1: I'm a Full Stack Engineer with 5+ years of experience building scalable, performant web applications. My passion lies in creating seamless user experiences backed by clean, maintainable code.
about.bio2: When I'm not pushing pixels or writing APIs, you'll find me contributing to open source, exploring new technologies, or mentoring the next generation of developers.

projects.title:
Projects that
speak for themselves.
projects.subtitle: A selection of work I'm proud of — from concept to deployment.

items.title: NexaCommerce
items.description: A headless e-commerce platform built with Next.js, Stripe, and a custom CMS. Handles 10k+ daily transactions with 99.9% uptime.

items.title: DesignFlow
items.description: A real-time collaborative design tool with WebSocket-powered live cursors, version history, and export to multiple formats.

items.title: DataPulse
items.description: An AI-powered analytics dashboard with predictive insights, custom chart builder, and automated PDF reporting.

items.title: AuthShield
items.description: A production-grade authentication microservice with OAuth2, MFA, rate limiting, and audit logging built on Go.

items.title: MobileFirst
items.description: A cross-platform mobile app for task management with offline sync, push notifications, and AI-powered prioritization.

items.title: OpenMetrics
items.description: An open-source monitoring tool for distributed systems with real-time alerting, span tracing, and Kubernetes integration.

skills.title:
Technologies I
live and breathe.
skills.subtitle: A toolkit refined through years of real-world engineering.

items.description: Leading a team of 6 engineers to build and scale a SaaS platform serving 200K+ users. Architected a micro-frontend system that reduced build times by 60%.
Delivered 15+ client projects from discovery to deployment. Specialized in performant React frontends and Node.js APIs. Introduced TypeScript across the entire codebase.
Built responsive marketing sites and interactive web experiences for Fortune 500 clients. Pioneered the adoption of modern animation libraries.
First engineering role. Developed internal tools and dashboards using Vue.js. Learned the fundamentals of agile development and CI/CD pipelines.

contact.title:
Let's build
something great.
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind, a question, or just want to say hi? I'm always open to new opportunities.
